rulings.Case Title: LIN WANG ET AL VS. ZHICHENG XUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order Striking Portions Of The Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 25, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF LIN WANG's Motion For Relief From Order Striking Portions Of The Complaint DENIED on all grounds listed in the Notice of Motion and/or Points and Authorities. Re: Extrinsic fraud/mistake: Notice of Entry of Order Granting Motion to Strike with leave to amend was served electronically on April 24, 2015. First Amended Complaint, if any was due by May 6, 2015. No evidence is presented to the Court that Plaintiff's former counsel at that time (or at the time of hearing on the Motion to Strike) experienced any medical/or other problems, which could potentially constitute extrinsic fraud or mistake. Re: relief per CCP 473(b): This motion is untimely Re: relief per CCP 128: No such relief is sought per the Notice of Motion. Per the Points and Authorities relief sought pursuant to this section is "to substitute Plaintiff's attorney immediately." There is no indication that Plaintiffs are seeking substitution of their current counsel, Alex Lemieux. Re: Leave to File Amended Complaint: such relief is not sought in the Notice of Motion. No proposed amended complaint attached to the motion and no declaration per CRC 3.1324 filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Notion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 25, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint continued to February 24, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFRO 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than February 5, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 861-863-865-867 VERMONT STREET, A CONDOMINIUM VS. CARL ERNST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 25, 2016, line 3. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction Hearing Required to address competent evidence re: causal connection between the leak and siding. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ONDYN HERSCHELLE VS. PILGRIM GRANTOR TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 25, 2016, line 4. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction GRANTED. The operative contract provides for "reasonable attorney's fees and costs." Opposing party cites no authority for the proposition that the lender may make a unilateral decision of the reasonableness of the fees and costs and demand their payment in order to reinstate the loan. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JOHNSON VS. WILLIAM PICKENS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 25, 2016, line 5. Plaintiff'S Application For Order Hearing Required to address good faith settlement negotiations. = (501/REQ)
